description_long: This nightstand features a compact, boxy form with a single front-facing drawer, finished in a dark wood tone with a subtle grain pattern. The top, sides, and back are a matte black, contrasting with the wood-textured drawer front. The drawer is flush with the frame and has a minimal, integrated handle, maintaining a sleek and modern appearance. The nightstand stands on four short, sturdy black legs that slightly elevate it above the ground, providing stability and a touch of visual lightness. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a functional and contemporary design. The overall construction suggests a blend of engineered wood and metal, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern nightstand with a dark wood drawer front, matte black body, and short black legs. Its design is minimalistic and functional, with a single integrated drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-textured drawer and integrated handle, framed by a matte black body and supported by four short legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid matte black panel and the depth of the nightstand, with the legs visible beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain matte black back panel and the symmetrical leg placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the matte black side and the nightstand's depth.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
